# WHAT: 02-problem

**Slide type:** information
**Section:** Problem

## Top-level outcome
Audience agrees that manual workflows are costly — numbers make the problem concrete.

## L1
Manual, repetitive engineering work costs real money; the cost is quantifiable.

## L2
- Three anchor stats (hours/week, $/engineer, velocity tax)
- One illustrative anecdote or ratio
- Link to deep-dive for methodology and raw data

## Verification criteria
- Stats cited with source attribution
- Action title is an assertion, not "Manual work"
- Deep-dive link present (`#/02-problem-detail`)
